description: A large shipment is due to arrive from a supplier. A warehouse manager must schedule a delivery appointment.

nodes.task_description: Receive a notification from the freight carrier that the shipment is ready for final delivery.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the alert from the carrier.

nodes.task_description: Check the warehouse's receiving dock schedule for availability.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds an open time slot for tomorrow morning.

nodes.task_description: Book the delivery appointment with the carrier.
